narrative:
91 Ohio House district has 69,289 registered voters, with 57.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.4 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -9.7% D−R vs -22.9% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
